---
title: "School syllabus mapping"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
draft: true
---

This page will let you find resources tailored to your learning pathway, allowing you to navigate by country, exam board, course, and topic.

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| cache: false #Always re-run the code chunk
library(jsonlite)

#Read the CSV file
nav <- read.csv("finalised_csv_content_management_final.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

#keep only the rows that have valid links in them
nav_clean <- nav[
  !is.na(nav[[5]]) &
  nav[[5]] != "" &
  nav[[5]] != "no",
  1:6
]

#Set a variable with the column names
names(nav_clean) <- c("country", "board", "course", "unit", "link", "button_title")

#Trim all the extra white space around the guide title to make it uniform throughout
nav_clean$button_title <- trimws(nav_clean$button_title)
nav_clean$button_title[is.na(nav_clean$button_title)] <- ""

#Build the country list
countries <- sort(unique(nav_clean$country))
countries <- countries[!is.na(countries) & countries != ""]

#Convert the CSV to a JSON
countries_json <- toJSON(countries, auto_unbox = TRUE)
nav_json       <- toJSON(nav_clean, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)

#Output
cat('
<h2>Pick your country</h2>
<div id="country-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="board-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your exam board</h2>
<div id="board-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="course-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your course</h2>
<div id="course-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="unit-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Pick your topic</h2>
<div id="unit-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<h2 id="guide-title" style="display:none; margin-top:2rem;">Relevant STARMAST guides</h2>
<div id="guide-container" class="country-grid"></div>

<script>
const countries = ', countries_json, ';
const navData   = ', nav_json, ';

//
const container       = document.getElementById("country-container");
const boardTitle      = document.getElementById("board-title");
const boardContainer  = document.getElementById("board-container");
const courseTitle     = document.getElementById("course-title");
const courseContainer = document.getElementById("course-container");
const unitTitle       = document.getElementById("unit-title");
const unitContainer   = document.getElementById("unit-container");
const guideTitle      = document.getElementById("guide-title");
const guideContainer  = document.getElementById("guide-container");

let selectedCountry = null;
let selectedBoard   = null;
let selectedCourse  = null;
let selectedUnit    = null;

//make the boxes for the country
countries.forEach(country => {
  const box = document.createElement("div");
  box.className = "country-box";
  box.textContent = country;
  box.onclick = () => {
    selectedCountry = country;
    selectedBoard = selectedCourse = selectedUnit = null;
    container.querySelectorAll(".country-box").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("selected"));
    box.classList.add("selected");
    boardContainer.innerHTML = "";
    courseContainer.innerHTML = "";
    unitContainer.innerHTML = "";
    guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
    courseTitle.style.display = unitTitle.style.display = guideTitle.style.display = "none";
    updateBoards();
  };
  container.appendChild(box);
});

//make the boxes for the boards
function updateBoards() {
  boardContainer.innerHTML = "";
  if (!selectedCountry) { boardTitle.style.display = "none"; return; }
  boardTitle.style.display = "block";
  const boardsForCountry = [...new Set(navData.filter(row => row.country === selectedCountry).map(row => row.board))].sort();
  boardsForCountry.forEach(board => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "board-box";
    box.textContent = board;
    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedBoard = board;
      selectedCourse = selectedUnit = null;
      boardContainer.querySelectorAll(".board-box").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("selected"));
      box.classList.add("selected");
      courseContainer.innerHTML = unitContainer.innerHTML = guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
      unitTitle.style.display = guideTitle.style.display = "none";
      updateCourses();
    };
    boardContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}

//Make the boxes for the courses
function updateCourses() {
  if (!selectedCountry || !selectedBoard) { courseTitle.style.display = "none"; return; }
  courseTitle.style.display = "block";
  courseContainer.innerHTML = "";
  const coursesForSelection = [...new Set(navData.filter(row => row.country === selectedCountry && row.board === selectedBoard).map(row => row.course))].sort();
  coursesForSelection.forEach(course => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "course-box";
    box.textContent = course;
    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedCourse = course;
      selectedUnit = null;
      courseContainer.querySelectorAll(".course-box").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("selected"));
      box.classList.add("selected");
      unitContainer.innerHTML = guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
      guideTitle.style.display = "none";
      updateUnits();
    };
    courseContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}

//Make the boxes for the units
function updateUnits() {
  if (!selectedCountry || !selectedBoard || !selectedCourse) { unitTitle.style.display = "none"; return; }
  unitTitle.style.display = "block";
  unitContainer.innerHTML = "";
  const unitsForSelection = [...new Set(navData.filter(row => row.country === selectedCountry && row.board === selectedBoard && row.course === selectedCourse).map(row => row.unit))].sort();
  unitsForSelection.forEach(unit => {
    const box = document.createElement("div");
    box.className = "unit-box";
    box.textContent = unit;
    box.onclick = () => {
      selectedUnit = unit;
      unitContainer.querySelectorAll(".unit-box").forEach(b => b.classList.remove("selected"));
      box.classList.add("selected");
      updateGuides();
    };
    unitContainer.appendChild(box);
  });
}

//Make the boxes for the guides
function updateGuides() {
  guideContainer.innerHTML = "";
  if (!selectedUnit) { guideTitle.style.display = "none"; return; }
  guideTitle.style.display = "block";
  const guidesForSelection = navData.filter(row => row.country === selectedCountry && row.board === selectedBoard && row.course === selectedCourse && row.unit === selectedUnit);
  guidesForSelection.forEach(guide => {
    const card = document.createElement("a");
    card.className = "guide-card";
    let href = guide.link || "";
    if (href.endsWith(".qmd")) href = href.slice(0, -4) + ".html";
    if (!href.startsWith("../") && !href.startsWith("/")) href = "../" + href;
    card.href = href;
    card.target = "_self";
    card.textContent = guide.button_title;
    guideContainer.appendChild(card);
  });
}
</script>

<style>
.country-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr)); gap:14px; margin-top:1rem; }
.country-box,.board-box,.course-box,.unit-box,.guide-card { padding:16px;border:2px solid #ccc;border-radius:12px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;transition:0.2s;background:#f8f8f8;text-decoration:none;color:black;display:block; }
.country-box:hover,.board-box:hover,.course-box:hover,.unit-box:hover,.guide-card:hover {
  border-color:#3F68B6;
  background:#C0D6FF;
  transform:translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}
.country-box.selected{ 
  border-color:#3F68B6;
  background:#C0D6FF;
  transform:translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  }
.board-box.selected{border-color:#3F68B6;background:#C0D6FF;}
.course-box.selected{border-color:#3F68B6;background:#C0D6FF;}
.unit-box.selected{border-color:#3F68B6;background:#C0D6FF;}
</style>
')
```
